name: PackageInfo

aliases.name: Dependency
aliases.comment: A dependency of a package, by name and version constraints

aliases.name: PackageInfo
aliases.comment: All data that can be found in an elm-package.json file
aliases.type: { version : Version, summary : String, repository : String, license : String, sourceDirectories : List String, exposedModules : List String, dependencies : List Dependency, elmVersion : VersionRange, nativeModules : Bool }

values.name: decoder
values.comment: A decoder for the contents of an elm-package.json file

values.name: encoder
values.comment:
An encoder to generate the JSON expected to be in an elm-package.json file
from the PackageInfo type

name: PackageInfo.VersionRange

aliases.name: VersionRange
aliases.comment:
Represents the contents of a version range constraint, expressed as
"X1.Y1.Z1 <= v < X2.Y2.Z2" in an elm-package.json file

values.name: contains
values.comment: Determine whether the given Version falls inside of the given VersionRange

values.name: decoder
values.comment:
Decode a JSON string of the format "X1.Y1.Z1 <= v < X2.Y2.Z2" as a
VersionRange

values.name: enclosing
values.comment:
Create a VersionRange that starts at the given Version and ends at the next
highest major version from the given Version

values.name: encoder
values.comment:
Encode a VersionRange as a JSON string with the format
"X1.Y1.Z1 <= v < X2.Y2.Z2"

values.name: fromString
values.comment:
Parse a VersionRange from a string with the format
"X1.Y1.Z1 <= v < X2.Y2.Z2"

values.name: toString
values.comment:
Convert an existing VersionRange back into a string with the format
"X1.Y1.Z1 <= v < X2.Y2.Z2"

name: PackageInfo.Version

aliases.name: Version
aliases.comment: Represents the contents of a SemVer version
aliases.type: { major : Int, minor : Int, patch : Int }

values.name: compare
values.comment:
Assess whether a given version is greater than the other based on the SemVer
scheme.

values.name: decoder
values.comment: Parse a JSON string of format X.Y.Z as a Version

values.name: encoder
values.comment: Convert a Version back into a JSON string value

values.name: fromString
values.comment:
Parse a Version from a string X.Y.Z, where X is the major version, Y is the
minor version, and Z is the patch version. Subversions of format X.Y.Z-alpha.1
are not supported.

values.name: toString
values.comment: Convert a value of type Version back into a string with the format X.Y.Z
